stream_required: B.E / B.Tech (CSE, AI, ML, Data Science, or related disciplines) M.E / M.Tech (CSE, AI, ML, Data Science, or related disciplines) M.Sc (Computer Science, AI, ML, Data Science, or related disciplines)
